context: Tests whether the agent creates a next-steps.sh script with the correct quality checks for a skill tile: tessl skill review for the skill, tessl scenario generate to kick off evals, and instructions for tessl eval run as a follow-up.

checklist.name: next-steps.sh includes skill review
checklist.description: next-steps.sh contains a tessl skill review command targeting the deploy skill.

checklist.name: next-steps.sh runs scenario generate
checklist.description: next-steps.sh runs tessl scenario generate as a direct command (not just printed or echoed).

checklist.name: next-steps.sh mentions eval run as follow-up
checklist.description: next-steps.sh references tessl eval run, either as a direct command or as a printed instruction for the user to run after reviewing scenarios.

checklist.name: Valid skill tile
checklist.description: The tile has a valid tile.json with skills section and a SKILL.md with proper frontmatter (name, description) and deployment content.

checklist.name: Explicit private field
checklist.description: The tile.json contains an explicit "private" field (either true or false).

checklist.name: next-steps.sh is executable
checklist.description: next-steps.sh exists in the tile root and has a shebang line (#!/usr/bin/env bash or similar).
